evals.name: positive-trigger
evals.prompt: Write me a comprehensive review of intermittent explosive disorder
evals.expected_output: The skill fires, chains to intent-lock first to lock audience/emphasis/length, then covers the full arc (definition, epidemiology, pathophysiology, clinical features, diagnosis, differential/comorbidity, treatment across all modalities with the ClinicalTrials.gov check, special populations, prognosis, controversies), writes one md file, and files it to the vault via vault-keeper under the disorder's MOC. Chat shows only the Close summary, not the whole chapter.

evals.name: negative-trigger
evals.prompt: Should I use prazosin for PTSD nightmares in my clinic patients?
evals.expected_output: Does not fire — this is a single clinical decision ('should I use X for Y'), which the Not-for clause routes to pubmed-research-note for a verdict-first evidence report.

evals.name: negative-trigger-surveillance
evals.prompt: Anything new in the literature on my watchlist this week?
evals.expected_output: Does not fire — windowed multi-domain surveillance belongs to psych-paper-digest, per the Not-for clause.
